IoT · Embedded Systems · Robotics

Smart Mine Survival & Hazard Monitoring Rover

◆ VIT Patent Filed — Doc No. 02-IPR-R003

A mobile, sensor-rich robotic rover designed for harsh underground mining conditions. The rover navigates tunnels remotely via Bluetooth joystick, continuously sampling air quality, detecting hazardous gases, monitoring temperature and humidity, and streaming live video — all accessible through a locally hosted IoT web dashboard from any nearby device.

Key Features
Six-wheel tracked chassis with shock-proof, dust-tolerant housing
Dual ESP32 setup — one for movement, one for sensor & IoT control
Multi-gas detection: Methane (MQ-4), LPG (MQ-5), Toxic fumes (MQ-135)
Real-time temperature, humidity, soil moisture & water leakage sensing
PIR motion sensor for detecting trapped miners or intruders
ESP32-CAM live video streaming to PC & mobile dashboard
Local Wi-Fi web server — no internet or cloud required
Automated SMS & push alerts on hazard threshold breach
Architecture & Dashboard
Tech Stack
ESP32 ESP32-CAM MQ Gas Sensors DHT22 Bluetooth Wi-Fi / HTTP H-Bridge Motor Driver IoT Dashboard PIR Sensor Ultrasonic HC-SR04
AI · Machine Learning · Healthcare · Software

AI-Driven Real-Time Hospital Bed Allocation & Patient Stability Prediction

◆ VIT Course Project — AI (ISWE302L) · Winter Semester 2025–26

Hospitals face critical challenges in efficiently managing beds during peak demand — emergencies, pandemics, and mass casualty events. This AI-powered system continuously monitors patient vitals (heart rate, SpO₂, blood pressure, respiratory rate, temperature, BMI) to predict stability in real time, then dynamically assigns ICU, HDU, or General Ward beds based on urgency and availability — reducing wait times and enabling faster, data-driven clinical decisions.

Model Performance — Random Forest Classifier
98.65%
Training Accuracy
95.75%
Testing Accuracy
95.50%
Cross-Val (5-fold)
Key Features
Classifies patients as Critical / Moderate / Stable from 8 vital parameters
Random Forest model trained on 78,556 cleaned patient records
Live bed availability tracking — ICU, HDU, General Ward
Stability score (0–100) drives direct bed assignment logic
Real-time admit, discharge & reallocation via web dashboard
AI prediction probabilities shown per patient on-screen
StandardScaler normalization + balanced class weighting
Supports scalable, cloud-ready hospital management integration
System Dashboard & Prediction Output
Tech Stack
Python Random Forest Scikit-learn Pandas / NumPy StandardScaler Real-Time Dashboard Healthcare AI 78,556 Records
